source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11
distilled_thesis: The bounded route distinguishes source radiance from carried reflection: bliss is not owned by the vessel, yet its reflected light can still be borne outward.
